perks.summary: classify — every resource CALL mapped to a named family; an exotic CALL raises unnamed
concord — extracted CFG contained in the declared blueprint (stmt* vocab); diff stored; tamper caught
conservation — acquire/release balance (B1 law); a real leak raises unexplained_defects
L++ emitted per snippet core — the pinned putrefactio typestate extractor (file-mode, no warehouse)
ancestor royalties (P6-T19) — a verified-tier publish pays the alchemy lineage through the reward ledger; a blocked subject pays nothing
